name: arcade-hub_v2
description: Welcome to **Arcade Hub**, a retro 90's arcade gaming WordPress theme that transforms your website into a nostalgic gaming paradise! This theme features browser-based game emulation, YouTube video galleries, a game database with filtering, and a retro reviews system.

scripts.sass:build: sass scss/main.scss:css/main.css --style expanded --source-map && sass scss/main.scss:css/main.min.css --style compressed --no-source-map
